case_title: TOBIN BROADHURST VS. DAVID MATTHEW DICK

docket_entries.description: D.M.V. CERTIFICATE OF FACTS RE UNSATISFIED JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BROADHURST, TOBIN AS TO DEFENDANT DICK, DAVID MATTHEW
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-12-2018 - JUDGMENT.
DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 300.00 - FILED BY PLAINTIFF BROADHURST, TOBIN AS TO DEFENDANT DICK, DAVID MATTHEW
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $722.41 FILED BY BROADHURST, TOBIN AS TO DEFENDANT DICK, DAVID MATTHEW ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-12-2018 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-12-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-12-2018 BY CECILIA P. CASTELLANOS. PLAINTIFF TOBIN BROADHURST IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT DAVID MATTHEW DICK IS PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. DEFENDANT WAIVES RIGHT TO SERVICE TO PROCEED TODAY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CECILIA P. CASTELLANOS; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. (506)

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BROADHURST, TOBIN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DICK, DAVID MATTHEW $722.41 PRINCIPAL, $30.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $752.41, FOR INSURANCE DEDUCTIBLE AND COST OF RENTAL CAR CAUSED BY DEFENDANT'S NEGLIGENCE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ORDER ON DISCHARGE OF EXAMINATION HEARING
COPYING FEES (5 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF BROADHURST, TOBIN

THE ORDER OF EXAMINATION IS DISCHARGED AS TO DEFENDANT, ALL PARTIES WERE PRESENT. JUDGMENT CREDITOR TOBIN BROADHURST IS PRESENT. JUDGMENT DEBTOR DAVID MATTHEW DICK IS PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. JUDGMENT DEBTOR WAIVES RIGHT TO SERVICE. UPON COMPLETION OF THE EXAMINATION, JUDGMENT CREDITOR IS SATISFIED WITH THE RESULTS. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JOANNE MADDEN; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT DICK, DAVID MATTHEW HEARING SET FOR JUL-09-2018 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506
